title: centaurea cuneifolia subsp. cuneifolia
intro: Centaurea cuneifolia subsp. cuneifolia is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and vibrant purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea cuneifolia subsp. cuneifolia include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, promote wound healing, and support kidney function, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
